title: dasyloma laciniatum
intro: Dasyloma laciniatum, also known as the pellitory root, is a plant species that belongs to the family Capparaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving headaches and pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Dasyloma laciniatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
